case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF VS. SIIAE FAUATEA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL-COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.
